title: LlamaCppRuntime score + embed implementations
goal: Implement the score() (sequence log-prob) and embed() (text -> embedding vector) ModelRuntime trait methods for LlamaCppRuntime via llama-cpp-2 evaluation primitives. score returns Score { token_logprobs, total_logprob }; embed returns Embedding { vector: Vec<f32>, model_id, dim }.
unblock_conditions: MT-074 generate path merged (shares sampler infrastructure).
implementation_notes: score: feed `sequence: Vec<u32>` token-by-token through llama_cpp_2 decode, collect logits[i][sequence[i+1]] (the logprob of the next token) for i in 0..len-1; return Score { token_logprobs: Vec<f32>, total_logprob: f32 (sum) }. Used by Memory V0+ Self-Improvement Loop scoring (MemoryCapsule effectiveness). embed: requires model loaded with embeddings=true context param (MT-073 added); call llama_cpp_2 embed_eval or llama_get_embeddings_ith to get pooled sentence embedding; return Embedding { vector, model_id, dim }. Embedding dimension is model-dependent (e.g., 768 / 1024 / 4096); store on Embedding struct so consumers can validate dim match. score on a model not loaded returns explicit Err; embed on a model with embeddings=false context returns CapabilityNotSupported. Tests (env-gated): score a known sequence on a small model and assert total_logprob is negative finite; embed two similar prompts and assert cosine_similarity > 0.7 (sanity check); embed on a non-embedding model returns CapabilityNotSupported.
risk_if_missed: score / embed paths missing; MemoryCapsule scoring (cluster D) cannot be implemented; self-improvement loop missing a signal.
validator_focus: Embedding dim matches model declared dim; sanity cosine similarity > 0.7 on similar prompts; capability gate correct.

minimum_controls: Embedding context requirement enforced (embed without embeddings=true returns CapabilityNotSupported).
score returns finite negative float (not NaN/Inf/positive).
Embedding dim asserted against model card declared dim.
